title: Sunset: The Mystery of the Necklace of São Cajó
original_title: Pôr do Sol - O Mistério do Colar de São Cajó
overview: Follows the Bourbon de Linhaça family and their precious Necklace of São Cajó, that's been in the family for over 3500 years and hides secrets, curses and a mythical cod recipe.
